scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.quality:check: pnpm run security:scan && pnpm run integration:audit && pnpm run test:widget && pnpm run test:nuvemshop-partners && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --filter "./server" --if-present run typecheck
